calendar.matters:
Trustees Third Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Jun-22-2015 Off Calendar

Trustees Third Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar May-05-2015 Continued To Jun-22-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Dec-07-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Patrick Sullivan for Bruna Bugeja (Trustee).

Mr. Sullivan stated that he has a revised Notice of Hearing and Proof of Service, as well as the verified amendment to the petition correcting 60-days to 90-days which he will file today. The Court granted the Petition for Instrcutions (subject to review of the order and subject verification of filing of said documents).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Oct-16-2012 Continued To Nov-20-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Aug-28-2012 Continued To Oct-16-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Patrick Sullivan for Bruna Bugeja.

Mr. Sullivan provided proof of mailing from the post office in open court. The Petition for Instructions was continued to October 16, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Sullivan to amend the petition to include a 90-day period for written agreement from the Beneficiary.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.
